items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to confirm that a conversation summary is available to the agent at resume time. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case describes the workflow's behavior upon customer reply, it lacks specific details on how the conversation summary is handled, leading to an inconclusive verdict regarding the requirement's coverage.
